commands.review_summary:
Adds an inline explanation and CodeQL suppression comment above the Telegram Desktop tempkey SHA512 derivation in the Postbox importer.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR documents and suppresses a CodeQL alert around existing code rather than reporting a user-visible runtime bug. Source inspection confirms the affected line and surrounding tempkey decryption path on current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Member-authored draft PR with an intentional security-alert suppression should stay with maintainer review rather than automated cleanup or repair.

target.title: fix(import): document Telegram tempkey hash
target.body:
## Summary
- Document the Telegram Desktop tempkey SHA512 derivation at the CodeQL alert site.
- Suppress the weak-hash alert because the hash mirrors Telegram's local file format and is not application password storage.

## Verification
- `python3 -m py_compile internal/telegramdesktop/scripts/import_postbox.py`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
